title: Shower Caddy, Shower Shelf No Drilling, Bathroom Accessory- Bath Storage for Shampoo (White-2 Pack)
features: 【2-Pack Bathroom Accessory】This bathroom storage set include 2*shower caddies. You can use it in the bathroom, kitchen, or anywhere you need extra storage.

【Rustproof and Waterproof】The bathroom shelves are made of high-quality steel, with sandblasting technology added to the surface to prevent rust and scratches. The bottom of the basket adopts a hollow design, which is more convenient for drainage.

【40LB Strong Load Bearing】 The transparent adhesive is made of nano-material, non-marking, waterproof, and powerful. Tested on numerous weights, the shower basket can hold up to 40 lb. Suitable for smooth and dust-free walls such as glass, tile, marble, etc. except the wallpaper.

【Wide Application】 This shower rack can be used separately on different occasions. One shower caddy in the bathroom can hold your various bath supplies. Another one can be used in the kitchen as a spice rack. Also, you can hold your detergent and fabric softener in the laundry room.

【Worry-free Purchase】 UUlioyer specializes in producing all kinds of shower accessories, and we provide 1-year after-sales service, If you have any questions during using the black bathroom storage, please feel free to contact us.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always ensure the shelf is securely mounted and not overloaded beyond the stated 40 lb capacity. Keep the shelf away from heat sources and do not use it in areas with high humidity or moisture to prevent rust and damage.
